message:
feat(fwc): add append-only operation audit log with structured history

New history module records every fwc operation invocation in JSONL format
with content hashing, input summarization, and filtered queries. Supports
filtering by connector, status, time range, and entry ID. Includes log
rotation at 10MB with configurable retention.

Wired into CLI as `fwc history` with --connector, --status, --since,
and --limit flags. 55 unit tests covering append, query, filter, rotation,
serialization, content hashing, input summarization, and duration parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
